_sourcing_note: I-65 Kentucky, Hardin/LaRue/Hart Counties, roughly exits 65-94 (Bonnieville, Upton, Sonora, Glendale, Elizabethtown). Official brand/agency sites (loves.com, racetrac.com, catscale.com, ta-petro.com, pilotflyingj.com, bluebeacon.com, transportation.ky.gov, iexitapp.com, truckstopsandservices.com, findtruckservice.com, allstays.com, coopsareopen.com, truckmap.com) were returned as HTTP 403 / egress-policy CONNECT denials in this session, so they could not be fetched directly. Per instructions, official URLs are cited but each field was corroborated using >=2 independent WebSearch result snippets. All 99 existing production KY listings are on the I-75 corridor (Eastern/Central-East KY) and none fall in this I-65 segment; no duplicates. Verified truck facilities cluster at Glendale Exit 86 and Elizabethtown Exits 91/94; exits 65/71/76/81 (Bonnieville/Upton/Sonora) had no verifiable truck facilities. Nearest I-65 rest area (Hart County MM 59 SB) is south of this segment's range and was excluded.

listings.name: Petro Stopping Center #330 (Petro Glendale)
listings.description: Full-service Petro Stopping Center (TravelCenters of America brand, #330) at I-65 Exit 86 (KY-222, Glendale), Hardin County. Reported: 12 diesel lanes, 263 truck parking spaces, on-site CAT Scale, TA Truck Service (Petro:Lube, ~5 service bays), Iron Skillet restaurant, showers, laundry, bulk DEF, ATM. Open 24 hours. Adjacent to a standalone Blue Beacon Truck Wash.
listings.corroboration: TA-Petro official location page (Petro Glendale, 554 W Glendale Hodgenville Rd, I-65 Exit 86) + truckstopsandservices (#330, I-65 Exit 86, 263 spaces, CAT scale, Iron Skillet, TA Truck Service, truck wash) + Find Truck Service (Petro #330, 270-369-6840) + TruckMap (zip 42740) all agree on brand, address, exit 86, 263 truck spaces, 12 diesel lanes. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Petro Glendale (#330)
listings.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at the Petro Stopping Center #330, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). One weigh per ticket, reweigh free at same location.
listings.corroboration: Petro/TA travel centers carry CAT Scales as standard; truckstopsandservices Petro #330 amenity list explicitly includes 'CAT scales', corroborated by the TA-Petro official Petro Glendale page listing scale services. Official CAT Scale locator egress-blocked.

listings.name: TA Truck Service - Petro Glendale
listings.description: TA Truck Service commercial repair shop (Petro:Lube) co-located at Petro Stopping Center #330, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). Approx. 5 service bays; road service, oil/lube, DOT inspections, brake/alignment, HVAC and electrical service, tire repair.
listings.corroboration: TA-Petro official Petro Glendale page + truckstopsandservices both list on-site truck service/repair with ~5 bays (oil & lube, truck repairs) at Petro #330, Exit 86. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippet.

listings.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash of Glendale
listings.description: Standalone Blue Beacon Truck Wash, a double-bay facility at I-65 Exit 86 next to the Petro Stopping Center (Petro Travel Plaza), Glendale. Services: truck/trailer exterior wash, trailer washouts, engine wash.
listings.corroboration: Blue Beacon official location listing (Glendale, KY, double bay next to Petro, Exit 86) + truckstopsandservices ('Blue Beacon Truck Wash | I-65 Exit 86') agree on brand, location and I-65 Exit 86. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippet.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #48 (Glendale)
listings.description: Pilot Travel Center #48 at I-65 Exit 86 (KY-222, Glendale), Hardin County. Reported: 11 diesel lanes, 11 bulk DEF lanes, 125 truck parking spaces, 8 showers, on-site CAT Scale, Wingfoot Truck Care (Goodyear commercial tire/service), McDonald's, laundry, ATM. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: Pilot Flying J official location page (Pilot #48, 58 Glendale Hodgenville Rd W, Exit 86) + truckstopsandservices (Pilot #48, I-65 Exit 86, 125 spaces, CAT scale, Wingfoot Truck Care, McDonald's) + Find Truck Service (270-369-7360) agree on brand, address, exit 86, 125 truck spaces, 11 diesel lanes. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Pilot Travel Center #48 (Glendale)
listings.description: CAT Scale certified truck scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #48, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale).
listings.corroboration: Pilot Flying J official location content and truckstopsandservices both list CAT Scales among the amenities for Pilot #48 at I-65 Exit 86. Official CAT Scale locator egress-blocked.

listings.name: Wingfoot Truck Care - Pilot #48 (Glendale)
listings.description: Wingfoot Truck Care (Goodyear commercial tire & truck service) co-located at Pilot Travel Center #48, I-65 Exit 86 (Glendale). Commercial tire sales/repair and truck service.
listings.corroboration: Pilot #48 official page and truckstopsandservices both list 'Wingfoot Truck Care' as the on-site truck service/tire facility at Exit 86. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippet.

listings.name: RaceTrac #2597 (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: RaceTrac travel center #2597 (RaceTrac's first Kentucky location) near I-65 Exit 91 (US-31W / Dixie Ave, at the Western Kentucky Parkway junction), Elizabethtown. Reported: 6 high-flow diesel lanes, 28 truck parking spaces, reefer plug-ins, bulk DEF, deli, RV parking, lighted paved lot. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: RaceTrac official store page (#2597, 813 E Dixie Ave, Elizabethtown) + truckstopsandservices ('RaceTrac | I-65 Exit 91', 28 truck spaces, 6 fuel lanes, reefer plugs, 270-982-1044) + iExit (RaceTrac at I-65 Exit 91) agree on identity, address, exit 91, truck accommodations. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

listings.name: CAT Scale - RaceTrac #2597 (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: Reported CAT Scale / truck scale at RaceTrac #2597, near I-65 Exit 91 (Elizabethtown).
listings.hold_reason: CAT Scale presence at a RaceTrac is atypical and could not be confirmed via the official CAT Scale locator (egress-blocked). Directory sources (truckstopsandservices, way.com, iExit) list a 'CAT scale / truck scale CAT' at this RaceTrac, but these directories may share source data; holding pending official CAT Scale locator confirmation.
listings.corroboration: Multiple freight directories list a CAT/truck scale at RaceTrac #2597 (Exit 91), but not independently confirmable via the official CAT Scale locator; held.

listings.name: Love's Travel Stop #716 (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: Love's Travel Stop #716 (opened March 2018) at 601 S Ring Road, Elizabethtown, at the I-65 / Western Kentucky Parkway junction (signed WK Parkway Exit 133; immediately adjacent to I-65 in the Elizabethtown freight hub). Reported: 8 diesel lanes, 63 truck parking spaces, 5 showers, on-site CAT Scale (certified scales), Love's Truck Care (3 service bays), Arby's, laundry, bulk DEF, dump station, game room. Open 24 hours.
listings.corroboration: Love's official location page + Love's 2018 opening press release + truckstopsandservices + Find Truck Service agree on Love's #716, 601 S Ring Rd Elizabethtown 42701, 270-982-2600, 63 truck spaces, 8 diesel lanes, 5 showers, CAT Scale, Love's Truck Care. Access is via WK Parkway Exit 133 at the I-65 junction; exact I-65 exit number left blank (not independently confirmed). Facility serves the Elizabethtown/I-65 freight hub. Official site egress-blocked; verified via directory snippets.

listings.name: CAT Scale - Love's Travel Stop #716 (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: CAT Scale (certified truck scale) co-located at Love's Travel Stop #716, Elizabethtown, at the I-65 / WK Parkway junction.
listings.corroboration: truckstopsandservices and Find Truck Service both explicitly list 'CAT Scales and certified scales' among amenities for Love's #716; Love's travel stops carry CAT Scales as standard. Official CAT Scale locator egress-blocked.

listings.name: Love's Truck Care - Love's #716 (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: Love's Truck Care shop (approx. 3 service bays) co-located at Love's Travel Stop #716, Elizabethtown. Commercial tire sales/repair, oil change and PM services, light mechanical/road service.
listings.corroboration: Yelp business listing 'Love's Truck Care, 601 S Ring Rd, Elizabethtown' + Michelin/Bridgestone commercial tire dealer locators (Love's Travel Stops, 601 Ring Rd) + truckstopsandservices (tire repair, truck repairs, 3 service bays) confirm an on-site Love's Truck Care tire/service shop. Official site egress-blocked; verified via multiple independent snippets.

listings.name: Plaza 94 (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: Plaza 94, a small independent fuel/travel plaza at I-65 Exit 94 (US-62 / N Mulberry St), Elizabethtown. Reported: diesel, approx. 5 truck parking spaces, deli/restaurant, ATM, and an on-site truck wash.
listings.corroboration: AllStays truck-stop detail (Plaza 94, I-65 Exit 94, 5 truck spaces, deli, restaurant, ATM, truck wash) + iExit Exit 94 business list both place Plaza 94 at I-65 Exit 94 (US-62), 2022 N Mulberry St, Elizabethtown. Phone not confirmed (left blank). Directory sources only; official site egress-blocked.

listings.name: Plaza 94 Truck Wash (Elizabethtown)
listings.description: Truck wash service reported on-site at Plaza 94, I-65 Exit 94, Elizabethtown.
listings.hold_reason: A truck wash is listed as a Plaza 94 amenity by AllStays/iExit, but the wash's brand, operating hours, attended/self-serve status, and current operational status could not be independently confirmed. Holding pending confirmation.
listings.corroboration: AllStays and iExit both mention a truck wash at Plaza 94 (Exit 94), but no independent confirmation of brand/operational status; held.

listings.name: Greenfield Inn & Suites Elizabethtown (I-65 Exit 94)
listings.description: Greenfield Inn & Suites (formerly Wingfield Inn & Suites) off I-65 Exit 94 (US-62), Elizabethtown. Offers free self parking with free RV, bus, and truck parking; 24-hour front desk, free breakfast, indoor pool.
listings.corroboration: Expedia/Orbitz/Travelocity property pages (Greenfield Inn & Suites Elizabethtown, KY I-65 Exit 94; formerly Wingfield Inn) consistently state free self parking plus free RV, bus, and truck parking. Address 1043 Executive Drive per Expedia; brand/OTA renaming noted. Truck parking confirmed by multiple independent OTA sources.

listings.name: Best Western Plus Elizabethtown Inn & Suites (I-65 Exit 94)
listings.description: Best Western Plus Elizabethtown Inn & Suites off I-65 Exit 94 (US-62 / N Mulberry St), Elizabethtown. 92 rooms; free parking with outside uncovered parking that accommodates buses, boats and large vehicles (truck parking); free hot breakfast, indoor saltwater pool, fitness center.
listings.corroboration: Best Western brand page + HotelGuides (I-65 Exit 94, truck parking) + HotelPlanner (2014 N Mulberry St, Elizabethtown 42701) confirm identity, Exit 94 location, and truck/large-vehicle parking (outside uncovered parking for buses/boats/large vehicles). Phone left blank (not confirmed).

listings.name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-65 Southbound (Elizabethtown, KSP Post 3)
listings.description: Permanent Kentucky state weigh/inspection station on I-65 Southbound near Elizabethtown, Hardin County (KSP Post 3 area), located between I-65 Exit 105 (to the north) and Exit 86 Glendale (to the south). Fixed scale with NORPASS/PrePass bypass capability.
listings.corroboration: TruckMap explicitly names 'Weigh Station Elizabethtown SB I-65 S' (southbound direction confirmed); coopsareopen 'Post 3 (Elizabethtown)' confirms an I-65 weigh station between Exit 86 (Pilot/Petro to the south) and Exit 105 (Pilot to the north), with NORPASS bypass (permanent fixed scale). Exact mile marker not independently confirmed (KYTC PDF egress-blocked); left blank. A northbound counterpart may exist but was not independently confirmed and is not listed.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop #716 (Ring Rd) - parkway-access consideration
excluded.reason: NOT excluded - retained and published. Documented here for transparency: this Love's is signed off WK Parkway Exit 133, but sits at the I-65 / WK Parkway junction in the Elizabethtown freight hub and genuinely serves I-65 traffic, so it is included with the I-65 exit number left blank.

excluded.name: Holiday Inn Express & Suites Elizabethtown North
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 94, but truck/semi parking could not be independently confirmed; per 'do not assume truck parking' rule, excluded from 'Hotels with Truck Parking'.

excluded.name: Hampton Inn Elizabethtown
excluded.reason: At I-65 Exit 94, but no confirmation of truck/semi parking; excluded from 'Hotels with Truck Parking'.

excluded.name: Hart County Rest Area (I-65 Southbound, MM 59/60, Horse Cave)
excluded.reason: Nearest I-65 rest area to this segment, but at mile marker ~59, south of this segment's range (exits/MM 65-94). Belongs to the Cave City/Horse Cave segment, not seg3.

excluded.name: Pilot Travel Center (old Davis Truck Stop), I-65 Exit 105
excluded.reason: Exit 105 is north of this segment's range (exits 65-94); belongs to the Radcliff/West Point segment.

excluded.name: Truck Parking Club - Elizabethtown/Glendale listings
excluded.reason: TruckParkingClub shows a general Elizabethtown page and reflects the Pilot #48 and Petro #330 lots (already listed as truck stops). No distinct independently verifiable bookable drop-lot address was confirmed for a standalone 'Truck Parking' listing; omitted rather than guessed.

excluded.name: Truck facilities at I-65 Exits 65/71/76/81 (Bonnieville, Upton, Sonora)
excluded.reason: These rural exits (KY-728 Exit 71, KY-224 Exit 76, KY-84 Exit 81) were searched; no truck stops, tire shops, truck washes, CAT scales, or truck-parking hotels were verifiable. Nothing added.
